---
author: "Alejandro Romero Gonzalez"
title: "Cosecha de tesis de todos los programas académicos del CIDE"
affiliation: "Banco de Mexico"
---

```{r}
try(Sys.setlocale("LC_ALL", "en_US.UTF-8"), silent = TRUE)

library(arrow)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library(xml2)
```

## Configuracion

La fuente principal es el endpoint OAI-PMH de DSpace. Esto permite cosechar la
comunidad completa de tesis en lotes, conservar valores repetidos y descubrir
nuevos programas sin mantener una lista manual de colecciones.

```{r}
root_url <- "https://repositorio-digital.cide.edu"
oai_url <- paste0(root_url, "/oai/request")
thesis_community_set <- "com_11651_3"

output_data_path <- "tesis_cide.parquet"
program_inventory_path <- "tesis_programas_resumen.parquet"
advisor_alias_path <- "data-raw/asesores_alias.csv"
advisor_merge_path <- "data-raw/asesores_canonicos_merge.csv"
advisor_quality_dir <- "data-quality"
unmapped_advisors_path <- file.path(advisor_quality_dir, "asesores_sin_alias.csv")
advisor_duplicates_path <- file.path(advisor_quality_dir, "asesores_posibles_duplicados.csv")
advisor_catalog_path <- "asesores_catalogo.parquet"

oai_read <- function(params, attempts = 5) {
  query <- paste(
    names(params),
    vapply(params, URLencode, character(1), reserved = TRUE),
    sep = "=",
    collapse = "&"
  )
  url <- paste0(oai_url, "?", query)

  for (attempt in seq_len(attempts)) {
    result <- tryCatch(read_xml(url, options = "HUGE"), error = identity)
    if (!inherits(result, "error")) return(result)

    if (attempt == attempts) {
      stop("No se pudo leer OAI-PMH despues de ", attempts, " intentos: ", url, "\n", result$message)
    }
    Sys.sleep(min(2 ^ attempt, 20))
  }
}

normalize_unicode <- function(values) {
  stringi::stri_trans_nfc(values)
}

first_value <- function(values) {
  values <- unique(str_squish(normalize_unicode(values)))
  values <- values[!is.na(values) & values != ""]
  if (length(values) == 0) NA_character_ else values[[1]]
}

collapse_values <- function(values, separator = " | ") {
  values <- unique(str_squish(normalize_unicode(values)))
  values <- values[!is.na(values) & values != ""]
  if (length(values) == 0) NA_character_ else paste(values, collapse = separator)
}
```

## Descubrimiento de programas

```{r}
sets_xml <- oai_read(list(verb = "ListSets"))
set_nodes <- xml_find_all(sets_xml, ".//*[local-name()='set']")

program_inventory <- tibble(
  collection_set = xml_text(xml_find_first(set_nodes, "./*[local-name()='setSpec']")),
  coleccion = xml_text(xml_find_first(set_nodes, "./*[local-name()='setName']"))
) %>%
  mutate(across(c(collection_set, coleccion), normalize_unicode)) %>%
  filter(
    str_detect(collection_set, "^col_11651_"),
    str_detect(
      coleccion,
      regex("^Tesis\\s+(Doctorado|Licenciatura|Maestr[ií]a)\\s+en\\s+", ignore_case = TRUE)
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    nivel = case_when(
      str_detect(coleccion, regex("Doctorado", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Doctorado",
      str_detect(coleccion, regex("Licenciatura", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Licenciatura",
      str_detect(coleccion, regex("Maestr", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Maestría",
      TRUE ~ "Otro"
    ),
    programa = str_remove(
      coleccion,
      regex("^Tesis\\s+(Doctorado|Licenciatura|Maestr[ií]a)\\s+en\\s+", ignore_case = TRUE)
    ),
    grado_programa = paste(nivel, "en", programa),
    collection_handle = collection_set %>%
      str_remove("^col_") %>%
      str_replace("_", "/"),
    collection_url = paste0(root_url, "/handle/", collection_handle)
  ) %>%
  arrange(factor(nivel, levels = c("Licenciatura", "Maestría", "Doctorado")), programa)

if (nrow(program_inventory) == 0) {
  stop("No se descubrieron colecciones academicas dentro de la comunidad de tesis.")
}

message("Programas de tesis descubiertos: ", nrow(program_inventory))
print(program_inventory, n = Inf)
```

## Cosecha OAI-PMH de todas las tesis

```{r}
parse_oai_record <- function(record, program_sets) {
  header <- xml_find_first(record, "./*[local-name()='header']")
  if (identical(xml_attr(header, "status"), "deleted")) return(NULL)

  set_specs <- xml_text(xml_find_all(header, "./*[local-name()='setSpec']"))
  collection_set <- intersect(set_specs, program_sets)
  if (length(collection_set) == 0) return(NULL)

  metadata <- xml_find_first(record, "./*[local-name()='metadata']/*[local-name()='dc']")
  if (inherits(metadata, "xml_missing")) return(NULL)

  values_for <- function(field) {
    xml_text(xml_find_all(metadata, paste0("./*[local-name()='", field, "']")))
  }

  identifiers <- values_for("identifier")
  oai_identifier <- xml_text(xml_find_first(header, "./*[local-name()='identifier']"))
  item_handle <- first_value(c(
    str_extract(identifiers, "11651/[0-9]+"),
    str_extract(oai_identifier, "11651/[0-9]+")
  ))
  item_url <- if (!is.na(item_handle)) {
    paste0(root_url, "/handle/", item_handle)
  } else {
    first_value(identifiers[str_detect(identifiers, "^https?://")])
  }

  date_values <- values_for("date")
  years <- str_extract(date_values, "(?<![0-9])(19|20)[0-9]{2}(?![0-9])")
  years <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(years[!is.na(years)]))
  issued_year <- if (length(years) == 0) NA_integer_ else years[[length(years)]]

  rights <- values_for("rights")
  access_right <- first_value(rights[str_detect(rights, regex("acceso|access", ignore_case = TRUE))])

  tibble(
    collection_set = collection_set[[1]],
    item_handle = item_handle,
    oai_identifier = oai_identifier,
    oai_datestamp = xml_text(xml_find_first(header, "./*[local-name()='datestamp']")),
    anio_pub = issued_year,
    autorx = collapse_values(values_for("creator")),
    titulo = first_value(values_for("title")),
    resumen = collapse_values(values_for("description"), separator = "\n\n"),
    materias = collapse_values(values_for("subject")),
    asesor = collapse_values(values_for("contributor")),
    idioma = first_value(values_for("language")),
    tipo_documento = first_value(values_for("type")),
    tipo_acceso = access_right,
    derechos = collapse_values(rights),
    publisher = collapse_values(values_for("publisher")),
    formato = collapse_values(values_for("format")),
    url = item_url
  )
}

harvest_oai_set <- function(set_spec) {
  pages <- list()
  token <- NULL
  page_number <- 0L
  complete_list_size <- NA_integer_

  repeat {
    page_number <- page_number + 1L
    params <- if (is.null(token)) {
      list(verb = "ListRecords", metadataPrefix = "oai_dc", set = set_spec)
    } else {
      list(verb = "ListRecords", resumptionToken = token)
    }

    page_xml <- oai_read(params)
    error_node <- xml_find_first(page_xml, ".//*[local-name()='error']")
    if (!inherits(error_node, "xml_missing")) {
      stop("OAI-PMH devolvio un error: ", xml_attr(error_node, "code"), " - ", xml_text(error_node))
    }

    record_nodes <- xml_find_all(page_xml, ".//*[local-name()='record']")
    pages[[page_number]] <- map_dfr(
      record_nodes,
      parse_oai_record,
      program_sets = program_inventory$collection_set
    )

    token_node <- xml_find_first(page_xml, ".//*[local-name()='resumptionToken']")
    if (!inherits(token_node, "xml_missing")) {
      complete_attr <- xml_attr(token_node, "completeListSize")
      if (!is.na(complete_attr) && complete_attr != "") {
        complete_list_size <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(complete_attr))
      }
      token <- str_squish(xml_text(token_node))
    } else {
      token <- NA_character_
    }

    harvested <- sum(map_int(pages, nrow))
    message(
      "Pagina OAI ", page_number,
      " | registros academicos acumulados: ", harvested,
      if (!is.na(complete_list_size)) paste0(" | total comunidad: ", complete_list_size) else ""
    )

    if (is.na(token) || token == "") break
    Sys.sleep(0.25)
  }

  bind_rows(pages)
}

tesis <- harvest_oai_set(thesis_community_set) %>%
  distinct(item_handle, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  left_join(program_inventory, by = "collection_set") %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      c(autorx, titulo, resumen, materias, asesor, idioma, tipo_documento, tipo_acceso, derechos, publisher, formato),
      ~na_if(str_squish(normalize_unicode(.x)), "")
    ),
    tiene_resumen = !is.na(resumen) & str_length(resumen) >= 40,
    calidad_texto = if_else(tiene_resumen, "titulo_y_resumen", "solo_titulo")
  )

if (nrow(tesis) == 0) stop("La cosecha OAI-PMH no produjo tesis academicas.")
if (anyDuplicated(tesis$item_handle) > 0) stop("Hay handles duplicados despues de la deduplicacion.")
if (any(is.na(tesis$titulo))) stop("Hay tesis sin titulo; revisar la cosecha antes de exportar.")
if (any(is.na(tesis$programa)) || any(is.na(tesis$nivel))) {
  stop("Hay tesis sin programa o nivel academico asignado.")
}
```

## Normalizacion de asesores

```{r}
required_alias_cols <- c("advisor_raw", "advisor_canonical")

if (!file.exists(advisor_alias_path)) {
  stop("No se encontro la tabla de alias de asesores: ", advisor_alias_path)
}

advisor_aliases <- read.csv(
  advisor_alias_path,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8",
  check.names = FALSE
) %>%
  as_tibble()

missing_alias_cols <- setdiff(required_alias_cols, names(advisor_aliases))
if (length(missing_alias_cols) > 0) {
  stop("Faltan columnas en la tabla de alias: ", paste(missing_alias_cols, collapse = ", "))
}

advisor_aliases <- advisor_aliases %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(required_alias_cols), ~str_squish(normalize_unicode(.x)))) %>%
  filter(advisor_raw != "", advisor_canonical != "") %>%
  distinct(advisor_raw, advisor_canonical)

conflicting_aliases <- advisor_aliases %>%
  count(advisor_raw, name = "n_canonicals") %>%
  filter(n_canonicals > 1)

if (nrow(conflicting_aliases) > 0) {
  stop(
    "Hay alias asociados a mas de un nombre canonico: ",
    paste(conflicting_aliases$advisor_raw, collapse = "; ")
  )
}

split_advisor_names <- function(value) {
  value <- normalize_unicode(value)
  if (is.na(value) || str_squish(value) == "") return(character())
  protected_conjunctions <- c(
    "Pablo Mijangos y González" = "Pablo Mijangos __PROTECTED_Y__ González",
    "Camila Pastor de María y Campos" = "Camila Pastor de María __PROTECTED_Y__ Campos"
  )
  for (original in names(protected_conjunctions)) {
    value <- str_replace_all(value, fixed(original), protected_conjunctions[[original]])
  }
  value %>%
    str_replace_all(";", " | ") %>%
    str_replace_all(regex(",\\s+(?=Ma\\.\\s)", ignore_case = TRUE), " | ") %>%
    str_replace_all(
      regex("\\s+(y|and)\\s+", ignore_case = TRUE),
      " | "
    ) %>%
    str_replace_all("__PROTECTED_Y__", "y") %>%
    str_split("\\s*\\|\\s*") %>%
    .[[1]] %>%
    str_squish() %>%
    .[. != ""]
}

advisor_occurrences <- map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(tesis)), function(index) {
  if (is.na(tesis$asesor[[index]]) || tesis$asesor[[index]] == "") return(tibble())
  tibble(
    advisor_raw = split_advisor_names(tesis$asesor[[index]]),
    anio_pub = tesis$anio_pub[[index]],
    titulo = tesis$titulo[[index]],
    programa = tesis$programa[[index]],
    nivel = tesis$nivel[[index]]
  )
})

clean_advisor_display <- function(value) {
  value <- str_squish(normalize_unicode(value))
  value <- str_replace_all(value, "[\\[\\]]", " ") %>% str_squish()
  value <- str_replace_all(value, "[\u2010\u2011\u2012\u2013\u2014-]+", " ")
  value <- str_remove(
    value,
    regex("\\s*,?\\s*\\(?(ph\\s*\\.?\\s*d|phd|m\\s*\\.?\\s*e)\\.?\\)?$", ignore_case = TRUE)
  )
  value <- str_remove(
    value,
    regex(
      "^((doctora|doctor|dra|dr|maestra|maestro|mtra|mtro|ph\\s*\\.?\\s*d|phd|m\\s*\\.?\\s*e|lic)\\.?\\s*)+",
      ignore_case = TRUE
    )
  )
  if (str_detect(value, ",")) {
    pieces <- str_split(value, "\\s*,\\s*", n = 2)[[1]]
    if (length(pieces) == 2) value <- paste(pieces[[2]], pieces[[1]])
  }
  value %>%
    str_replace_all("[^[:alpha:]' ]+", " ") %>%
    str_squish() %>%
    str_to_title(locale = "es")
}

advisor_ordered_key <- function(value) {
  value %>%
    clean_advisor_display() %>%
    stringi::stri_trans_general("Latin-ASCII") %>%
    str_to_lower() %>%
    str_replace_all("[^a-z ]+", " ") %>%
    str_squish()
}

advisor_key <- function(value) {
  tokens <- advisor_ordered_key(value) %>% str_split("\\s+") %>% .[[1]]
  tokens <- tokens[
    !tokens %in% c("de", "del", "la", "las", "los", "y", "da", "do") &
      str_length(tokens) > 1
  ]
  paste(sort(unique(tokens)), collapse = " ")
}

explicit_aliases <- advisor_aliases %>%
  mutate(
    advisor_canonical_clean = map_chr(advisor_canonical, clean_advisor_display),
    advisor_key = map_chr(advisor_raw, advisor_key)
  )

conflicting_keys <- explicit_aliases %>%
  distinct(advisor_key, advisor_canonical_clean) %>%
  count(advisor_key, name = "n_canonicals") %>%
  filter(advisor_key != "", n_canonicals > 1)

if (nrow(conflicting_keys) > 0) {
  stop(
    "La tabla explicita contiene claves normalizadas asociadas a personas distintas: ",
    paste(conflicting_keys$advisor_key, collapse = "; ")
  )
}

variant_stats <- advisor_occurrences %>%
  count(advisor_raw, name = "n_tesis") %>%
  mutate(
    advisor_display = map_chr(advisor_raw, clean_advisor_display),
    advisor_key = map_chr(advisor_raw, advisor_key)
  )

auto_representatives <- variant_stats %>%
  mutate(
    n_non_ascii = str_count(advisor_display, "[^ -~]"),
    display_length = str_length(advisor_display)
  ) %>%
  arrange(advisor_key, desc(n_tesis), desc(n_non_ascii), desc(display_length), advisor_display) %>%
  group_by(advisor_key) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(advisor_key, advisor_canonical_auto = advisor_display)

explicit_exact <- explicit_aliases %>%
  distinct(advisor_raw, advisor_canonical_exact = advisor_canonical_clean)
explicit_by_key <- explicit_aliases %>%
  distinct(advisor_key, advisor_canonical_key = advisor_canonical_clean)

advisor_variant_map <- variant_stats %>%
  left_join(explicit_exact, by = "advisor_raw") %>%
  left_join(explicit_by_key, by = "advisor_key") %>%
  left_join(auto_representatives, by = "advisor_key") %>%
  mutate(
    advisor_canonical = coalesce(
      advisor_canonical_exact,
      advisor_canonical_key,
      advisor_canonical_auto,
      advisor_display
    ),
    homologation_method = case_when(
      !is.na(advisor_canonical_exact) ~ "alias_explicito",
      !is.na(advisor_canonical_key) ~ "clave_de_alias",
      TRUE ~ "clave_normalizada"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(advisor_raw, advisor_display, advisor_key, advisor_canonical, homologation_method, n_tesis)

if (!file.exists(advisor_merge_path)) {
  stop("No se encontro la tabla de fusiones canonicas: ", advisor_merge_path)
}

advisor_merges <- read.csv(
  advisor_merge_path,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8",
  check.names = FALSE
) %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(across(c(canonical_variant, canonical_target), ~map_chr(.x, clean_advisor_display))) %>%
  filter(canonical_variant != "", canonical_target != "") %>%
  distinct(canonical_variant, canonical_target)

conflicting_merges <- advisor_merges %>%
  count(canonical_variant, name = "n_targets") %>%
  filter(n_targets > 1)
if (nrow(conflicting_merges) > 0) {
  stop("Hay nombres canonicos con mas de un destino de fusion.")
}

canonical_merge_map <- setNames(advisor_merges$canonical_target, advisor_merges$canonical_variant)
resolve_canonical_merge <- function(value) {
  seen <- character()
  current <- value
  repeat {
    next_value <- unname(canonical_merge_map[current])
    if (length(next_value) == 0 || is.na(next_value) || next_value == "") break
    if (current %in% seen) stop("Se detecto un ciclo en asesores_canonicos_merge.csv: ", value)
    seen <- c(seen, current)
    current <- next_value
  }
  current
}

advisor_variant_map <- advisor_variant_map %>%
  mutate(
    advisor_canonical_premerge = advisor_canonical,
    advisor_canonical = map_chr(advisor_canonical, resolve_canonical_merge),
    homologation_method = if_else(
      advisor_canonical != advisor_canonical_premerge,
      "fusion_curada",
      homologation_method
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-advisor_canonical_premerge)

variant_to_canonical <- setNames(advisor_variant_map$advisor_canonical, advisor_variant_map$advisor_raw)
variant_to_method <- setNames(advisor_variant_map$homologation_method, advisor_variant_map$advisor_raw)

normalize_advisors <- function(value, mapping) {
  if (is.na(value) || str_squish(value) == "") return(NA_character_)
  parts <- split_advisor_names(value)
  mapped <- unname(mapping[parts])
  mapped[is.na(mapped) | mapped == ""] <- parts[is.na(mapped) | mapped == ""]
  paste(unique(mapped), collapse = " | ")
}

tesis <- tesis %>%
  mutate(
    asesor_unificado = map_chr(asesor, normalize_advisors, mapping = variant_to_canonical),
    asesor_homologacion_metodo = map_chr(asesor, normalize_advisors, mapping = variant_to_method)
  )

unmapped_advisors <- advisor_occurrences %>%
  left_join(
    advisor_variant_map %>% select(advisor_raw, advisor_canonical, homologation_method),
    by = "advisor_raw"
  ) %>%
  filter(homologation_method != "alias_explicito") %>%
  group_by(advisor_raw) %>%
  summarise(
    n_tesis = n(),
    n_programas = n_distinct(programa),
    anio_min = if (all(is.na(anio_pub))) NA_integer_ else min(anio_pub, na.rm = TRUE),
    anio_max = if (all(is.na(anio_pub))) NA_integer_ else max(anio_pub, na.rm = TRUE),
    programas = paste(sort(unique(programa)), collapse = " | "),
    ejemplo_titulo = first(titulo[!is.na(titulo) & titulo != ""], default = NA_character_),
    advisor_canonical_sugerido = first(advisor_canonical),
    metodo_sugerencia = first(homologation_method),
    notas = "Revisar y promover a data-raw/asesores_alias.csv si requiere una fusion adicional",
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_tesis), advisor_raw)

advisor_catalog <- advisor_occurrences %>%
  left_join(
    advisor_variant_map %>% select(advisor_raw, advisor_key, advisor_canonical, homologation_method),
    by = "advisor_raw"
  ) %>%
  group_by(advisor_canonical) %>%
  summarise(
    advisor_key = first(advisor_key),
    n_tesis = n(),
    n_programas = n_distinct(programa),
    programas = paste(sort(unique(programa)), collapse = " | "),
    niveles = paste(sort(unique(nivel)), collapse = " | "),
    anio_min = if (all(is.na(anio_pub))) NA_integer_ else min(anio_pub, na.rm = TRUE),
    anio_max = if (all(is.na(anio_pub))) NA_integer_ else max(anio_pub, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_variantes = n_distinct(advisor_raw),
    variantes = paste(sort(unique(advisor_raw)), collapse = " | "),
    metodos = paste(sort(unique(homologation_method)), collapse = " | "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_tesis), advisor_canonical)

advisor_candidates <- advisor_catalog %>%
  mutate(
    ordered_key = map_chr(advisor_canonical, advisor_ordered_key),
    tokens = str_split(ordered_key, "\\s+"),
    first_initial = map_chr(tokens, ~str_sub(.x[[1]], 1, 1)),
    last_token = map_chr(tokens, ~tail(.x, 1)),
    blocking_key = paste(first_initial, last_token, sep = "|")
  )

empty_candidate_pairs <- tibble(
  advisor_a = character(),
  advisor_b = character(),
  n_tesis_a = integer(),
  n_tesis_b = integer(),
  similarity = double(),
  token_containment = double(),
  shared_tokens = integer(),
  union_tokens = integer(),
  decision = character()
)

candidate_pairs <- if (nrow(advisor_candidates) < 2) {
  empty_candidate_pairs
} else {
  candidate_rows <- advisor_candidates %>%
    group_split(blocking_key) %>%
    map_dfr(function(block) {
      if (nrow(block) < 2) return(tibble())
      map_dfr(combn(seq_len(nrow(block)), 2, simplify = FALSE), function(pair) {
        left <- block[pair[[1]], ]
        right <- block[pair[[2]], ]
        left_tokens <- left$tokens[[1]]
        right_tokens <- right$tokens[[1]]
        union_size <- length(union(left_tokens, right_tokens))
        shared_size <- length(intersect(left_tokens, right_tokens))
        containment <- shared_size / max(1, min(length(left_tokens), length(right_tokens)))
        similarity <- 1 - as.numeric(adist(left$ordered_key, right$ordered_key)) /
          max(1, str_length(left$ordered_key), str_length(right$ordered_key))

        if (shared_size >= 2 && (similarity >= 0.82 || containment >= 0.75)) {
          tibble(
            advisor_a = left$advisor_canonical,
            advisor_b = right$advisor_canonical,
            n_tesis_a = left$n_tesis,
            n_tesis_b = right$n_tesis,
            similarity = round(similarity, 3),
            token_containment = round(containment, 3),
            shared_tokens = shared_size,
            union_tokens = union_size,
            decision = "revisar"
          )
        } else {
          tibble()
        }
      })
    })
  bind_rows(empty_candidate_pairs, candidate_rows) %>%
    arrange(desc(similarity), desc(token_containment), advisor_a, advisor_b)
}

dir.create(advisor_quality_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
write.csv(
  unmapped_advisors,
  unmapped_advisors_path,
  row.names = FALSE,
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8",
  na = ""
)
write.csv(
  candidate_pairs,
  advisor_duplicates_path,
  row.names = FALSE,
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8",
  na = ""
)
write_parquet(advisor_catalog, advisor_catalog_path)

message("Nombres canonicos de profesorado: ", nrow(advisor_catalog))
message("Variantes sin alias explicito, pero con canonico deterministico: ", nrow(unmapped_advisors))
message("Pares aproximados pendientes de revision: ", nrow(candidate_pairs))
```

## Validacion y exportacion

```{r}
tesis <- tesis %>%
  select(
    anio_pub, autorx, titulo, resumen, materias,
    asesor, asesor_unificado, asesor_homologacion_metodo, idioma, tipo_documento, tipo_acceso,
    derechos, publisher, formato,
    nivel, programa, grado_programa, coleccion,
    collection_handle, collection_set, collection_url,
    item_handle, oai_identifier, oai_datestamp,
    tiene_resumen, calidad_texto, url
  ) %>%
  arrange(nivel, programa, anio_pub, titulo)

program_summary <- tesis %>%
  group_by(nivel, programa, grado_programa, coleccion, collection_handle, collection_url) %>%
  summarise(
    n_tesis = n(),
    n_con_resumen = sum(tiene_resumen),
    cobertura_resumen = mean(tiene_resumen),
    anio_min = if (all(is.na(anio_pub))) NA_integer_ else min(anio_pub, na.rm = TRUE),
    anio_max = if (all(is.na(anio_pub))) NA_integer_ else max(anio_pub, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_idiomas = n_distinct(idioma, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(factor(nivel, levels = c("Licenciatura", "Maestría", "Doctorado")), desc(n_tesis))

write_parquet(tesis, output_data_path)
write_parquet(program_summary, program_inventory_path)

message("Tesis exportadas: ", nrow(tesis))
message("Programas exportados: ", nrow(program_summary))
message("Cobertura global de resumen: ", sprintf("%.1f%%", 100 * mean(tesis$tiene_resumen)))
message("Archivo canonico: ", normalizePath(output_data_path, mustWork = FALSE))
message("Inventario de programas: ", normalizePath(program_inventory_path, mustWork = FALSE))

print(program_summary, n = Inf)
```
